Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript
' ' Diagram Script main function ' sub OnDiagramScript()
' Get a reference to the current diagram dim currentDiagram as EA.Diagram set currentDiagram = Repository.GetCurrentDiagram()
if not currentDiagram is nothing then ' Get a reference to any selected connector/objects dim selectedConnector as EA.Connector dim selectedObjects as EA.Collection dim objDO as EA.DiagramObject Dim objEle as EA.Element Dim objAttribute as EA.Attribute Dim objColumn as EA.Attribute Dim objPack as EA.Package Dim objTable as EA.Element
set selectedConnector = currentDiagram.SelectedConnector set selectedObjects = currentDiagram.SelectedObjects
if not selectedConnector is nothing then elseif selectedObjects.Count > 0 then Set objPack = Repository.GetPackageById(currentDiagram.PackageID) For each objDO in selectedObjects set objEle = Repository.GetElementById(objDO.elementid) Set objTable = objPack.Elements.AddNew(objEle.Name, "EAUML::table") objTable.Notes = "Copy from class to table by script" objTable.Gentype = "Oracle" objTable.Type = "table" For each objAttribute in objEle.Attributes Set objColumn = objTable.Attributes.AddNew(objAttribute.Name, "Column") objColumn.AllowDuplicates = objAttribute.AllowDuplicates objColumn.Notes = objAttribute.Notes objColumn.Type = Attribute2Column(objAttribute.Type) objColumn.Update() Next objTable.Update Session.Output objEle.Name Dim objCon as EA.Connector set objCon = objEle.Connectors.AddNew("Class to table", "trace") objCon.SupplierID = objEle.ElementID objCon.ClientID = objTable.elementId objCon.Update() objEle.Update() Dim objDON As EA.DiagramObject Set objDON = currentDiagram.DiagramObjects.AddNew("", "") objDON.ElementID = objTable.ElementID objDON.top = objDO.top objDON.bottom = objDO.bottom objDON.left = objDO.Left + (objDO.right - objDO.left) + 50 objDON.right = objDO.right + (objDO.right - objDO.left) + 50 objDON.ShowNotes = false objDON.Update() currentDiagram.Update Repository.ReloadDiagram(currentDiagram.DiagramID) Next else Session.Output "Select one or more classes" end if else Session.Prompt "This script requires a diagram to be visible", promptOK end if
end sub
Function Attribute2Column(strAttribute) Dim strRet
' This Should be replaced by a more data driven approach Select Case UCase(strAttribute) Case "STRING" strRet = "NVARCHAR" Case "DATE" strRet = "DATE" Case "LONG", "INTEGER", "DOUBLE" strRet = "NUMBER" Case Else strRet = "ANYDATA" End Select
Attribute2Column = strRet
End Function
OnDiagramScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript
' ' Diagram Script main function ' sub OnDiagramScript()
' Get a reference to the current diagram dim currentDiagram as EA.Diagram set currentDiagram = Repository.GetCurrentDiagram()
if not currentDiagram is nothing then ' Get a reference to any selected connector/objects dim selectedConnector as EA.Connector dim selectedObjects as EA.Collection dim objDO as EA.DiagramObject Dim objEle as EA.Element Dim objAttribute as EA.Attribute Dim objColumn as EA.Attribute Dim objPack as EA.Package Dim objArch as EA.Element
set selectedConnector = currentDiagram.SelectedConnector set selectedObjects = currentDiagram.SelectedObjects
if not selectedConnector is nothing then elseif selectedObjects.Count > 0 then Set objPack = Repository.GetPackageById(currentDiagram.PackageID) For each objDO in selectedObjects set objEle = Repository.GetElementById(objDO.elementid) Set objArch = objPack.Elements.AddNew(objEle.Name, "ArchiMate_DataObject") objArch.Notes = "Copy from class to dataobject" objArch.Update Session.Output objEle.Name Dim objCon as EA.Connector set objCon = objEle.Connectors.AddNew("Class to data object", "trace") objCon.SupplierID = objEle.ElementID objCon.ClientID = objArch.elementId objCon.Update() objEle.Update() Dim objDON As EA.DiagramObject Set objDON = currentDiagram.DiagramObjects.AddNew("", "") objDON.ElementID = objArch.ElementID objDON.top = objDO.top objDON.bottom = objDO.top - 50 objDON.left = objDO.Left + (objDO.right - objDO.left) + 50 objDON.right = objDO.right + (objDO.right - objDO.left) + 50 objDON.ShowNotes = false objDON.Update() currentDiagram.Update Repository.ReloadDiagram(currentDiagram.DiagramID) Next else Session.Output "Select one or more classes" end if else Session.Prompt "This script requires a diagram to be visible", promptOK end if
end sub
OnDiagramScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib
' Diagram Script main function sub OnDiagramScript()
' Get a reference to the current diagram dim currentDiagram as EA.Diagram set currentDiagram = Repository.GetCurrentDiagram()
if not currentDiagram is nothing then Table2MappingDiagram( currentDiagram ) else Session.Prompt "This script requires a diagram to be visible", promptOK end if
end sub
OnDiagramScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib
' ' Project Browser Script main function ' sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
' Handling Code: Uncomment any types you wish this script to support ' NOTE: You can toggle comments on multiple lines that are currently ' selected with [CTRL]+[SHIFT]+[C]. select case treeSelectedType
case otElement dim theElement as EA.Element set theElement = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClass theElement, Repository.GetPackageByID(theElement.PackageID), "TABLE" ' case otPackage ' ' Code for when a package is selected ' dim thePackage as EA.Package ' set thePackage = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' case otDiagram ' Code for when a diagram is selected dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClassFromDiagram theDiagram, "TABLE" ' case otAttribute ' ' Code for when an attribute is selected ' dim theAttribute as EA.Attribute ' set theAttribute = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' ' case otMethod ' ' Code for when a method is selected ' dim theMethod as EA.Method ' set theMethod = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject()
case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript
Function CopyClass(objEle, objPack, strType) Dim objNew as EA.Element Dim intCreateAttribConnector intCreateAttribConnector = ResultNo
Select Case Ucase(strType) Case "INTERFACE" Dim strPrefix If Session.Prompt("Create a lookup interface?", promptYesNo) = resultYes Then strPrefix = "Lookup" Else strPrefix = "Interface" End If set objNew = objPack.Elements.AddNew(strPrefix & "_" & objEle.Name, "Interface") objNew.Notes = "Copy from class to interface by script" objNew.Gentype = "VBNet" intCreateAttribConnector = Session.Prompt("Create connections for each attribute of " & objEle.Name, promptYesNo) CopyAttributes objEle, objNew, "Class", intCreateAttribConnector Case "CLASS" set objNew = objPack.Elements.AddNew(objEle.Name, "Class") objNew.Notes = "Copy from table to class by script" objNew.Gentype = "VBNet" intCreateAttribConnector = Session.Prompt("Create connections for each attribute of " & objEle.Name, promptYesNo) CopyAttributes objEle, objNew, "Class", intCreateAttribConnector Case "XSD" set objNew = objPack.Elements.AddNew(objEle.Name, "Class") objNew.Notes = "Copy from class to XSD by script" objNew.Gentype = "SQL Server 2012" objNew.Type = "Class" objNew.StereoType = "XSDcomplexType" intCreateAttribConnector = Session.Prompt("Create connections for each attribute of " & objEle.Name, promptYesNo) CopyAttributes objEle, objNew, "XSD", intCreateAttribConnector Case "TABLE" set objNew = objPack.Elements.AddNew(objEle.Name, "EAUML::table") objNew.Notes = "Copy from class to table by script" objNew.Gentype = "SQL Server 2012" objNew.Type = "Class" objNew.StereoType = "table" intCreateAttribConnector = Session.Prompt("Create connections for each attribute of " & objEle.Name, promptYesNo) CopyAttributes objEle, objNew, "Table", intCreateAttribConnector Case "BUSINESSOBJECT" set objNew = objPack.Elements.AddNew(objEle.Name, "ArchiMate_BusinessObject") objNew.Notes = "Copy from class to businessobject by script" Case "DATAOBJECT" set objNew = objPack.Elements.AddNew(objEle.Name, "ArchiMate_DataObject") objNew.Notes = "Copy from class to dataobject by script" End Select objNew.Update If intCreateAttribConnector = ResultNo Then Dim objCon as EA.Connector set objCon = objEle.Connectors.AddNew(objEle.Name & " to " & Lcase(strType), "trace") objCon.SupplierID = objEle.ElementID objCon.ClientID = objNew.elementid objCon.Update() objEle.Update() End If Session.Output objEle.Name & " Copied " CopyClass = objNew.elementid End Function
Sub CopyClassFromDiagram(currentDiagram, strType) if not currentDiagram is nothing then ' Get a reference to any selected connector/objects dim selectedConnector as EA.Connector dim selectedObjects as EA.Collection dim objDO as EA.DiagramObject Dim objDL as EA.DiagramLink Dim strNew_Id Dim objPack as EA.Package Dim objEle as EA.Element Dim objNewDiagram as EA.Diagram
Set objPack = Repository.GetPackageById(currentDiagram.PackageID) Select Case Ucase(strType) Case "CLASS" Set objNewDiagram = objPack.Diagrams.AddNew(currentDiagram.Name & " Class", "Logical") Case "XSD" Set objNewDiagram = objPack.Diagrams.AddNew(currentDiagram.Name & " XSD", "Logical") Case "TABLE" Set objNewDiagram = objPack.Diagrams.AddNew(currentDiagram.Name & " Database", "Logical") Case "BUSINESSOBJECT" Set objNewDiagram = objPack.Diagrams.AddNew(currentDiagram.Name & " Business objects", "ArchiMate3::Business") Case "DATAOBJECT" Set objNewDiagram = objPack.Diagrams.AddNew(currentDiagram.Name & " Data objects", "ArchiMate3::Application") End Select
objNewDiagram.Update For each objDO in currentDiagram.DiagramObjects set objEle = Repository.GetElementById(objDO.ElementID) strNew_id = CopyClass(objEle, objPack, strType) Dim objDON As EA.DiagramObject Set objDON = objNewDiagram.DiagramObjects.AddNew("", "") objDON.ElementID = strNew_Id objDON.top = objDO.top objDON.bottom = objDO.bottom objDON.left = objDO.Left + (objDO.right - objDO.left) objDON.right = objDO.right + (objDO.right - objDO.left) objDON.ShowNotes = false objDON.Update() Next objNewDiagram.Update objNewDiagram.DiagramObjects.Refresh
For each objDL in currentDiagram.DiagramLinks CopyConnector2Diagram Repository.GetConnectorByID(objDL.ConnectorID), objNewDiagram objNewDiagram.Update Next else Session.Prompt "This script requires a diagram to be visible", promptOK end if
end sub
Function CopyConnector2Diagram( objConnector, objDiagram )
Dim strSupplier, strClient, strSupplierID, strClientID Dim objDO as EA.DiagramObject Dim objElement as EA.Element Dim objNewConnector AS EA.Connector
strSupplier = Repository.GetElementByID(objConnector.SupplierId).Name strClient = Repository.GetElementByID(objConnector.ClientId).Name Session.Output strSupplier & strClient objDiagram.Update Session.Output objDiagram.DiagramObjects.Count For Each objDO In objDiagram.DiagramObjects Dim objDgrmElement As EA.Element Set objDgrmElement = Repository.GetElementById(objDO.ElementID) Session.Output objDO.ElementID & "Loop" If objDgrmElement.Name = strSupplier Then strSupplierId = objDO.ElementID End If If objDgrmElement.Name = strClient Then strClientId = objDO.ElementID End If Next Set objElement = Repository.GetElementByID(strSupplierId) Set objNewConnector = objElement.Connectors.AddNew("", objConnector.Stereotype) objNewConnector.SupplierID = strSupplierID objNewConnector.ClientID = strClientID objNewConnector.Stereotype = objConnector.Stereotype objNewConnector.Type = objConnector.Type objNewConnector.Update
CopyConnector2Diagram = objNewConnector.ConnectorID End Function
Sub CopyAttributes( objSource, objTarget, strType, intCreateConnection)
Dim objAttribute as EA.Attribute Dim objColumn as EA.Attribute Dim strAttribute
Select Case strType Case "Table" strAttribute = "Column" Case "XSD" strAttribute = "XSDelement" Case Else strAttribute = "" End Select Session.Output strType & strAttribute
For each objAttribute in objSource.Attributes Set objColumn = objTarget.Attributes.AddNew(objAttribute.Name, strAttribute) objColumn.AllowDuplicates = objAttribute.AllowDuplicates objColumn.Notes = objAttribute.Notes objColumn.IsID = objAttribute.IsID objColumn.Pos = objAttribute.Pos objColumn.Type = Attribute2Column(objAttribute.Type, objSource.StereoType, objTarget.Stereotype) objColumn.Stereotype = strAttribute objColumn.Update objTarget.Update If intCreateConnection = resultYes Then CreateConnectorForAttribute objAttribute, objColumn End If Next
End Sub
Function Attribute2Column(strAttribute, strSourceType, strTargetType) Dim strRet Dim intTeller Dim VBNet Dim SQLServer Dim XSD Dim SourceArray Dim TargetArray
VBNet = Array("String", "Date", "Long", "Integer", "Double", "Boolean", "DateTime", "Decimal") XSD = Array("string", "date", "long", "int", "double", "boolean", "dateTime", "decimal") SQLServer = Array("nvarchar", "date", "number", "number", "number", "bit", "datetime", "decimal")
Select case UCase(strSourceType) Case "TABLE" SourceArray = SQLServer Case "XSDCOMPLEXTYPE" SourceArray = XSD Case Else SourceArray = VBNet End Select
Select case UCase(strTargetType) Case "TABLE" TargetArray = SQLServer strRet = "sql_variant" Case "XSDCOMPLEXTYPE" TargetArray = XSD strRet = "anyType" Case Else TargetArray = VBNet strRet = "Variant" End Select
intTeller = 0 While intTeller <= UBound(SourceArray) Session.Output SourceArray(intTeller) & " Attribuut " & strAttribute If UCase(SourceArray(intTeller)) = UCase(strAttribute) Then strRet = TargetArray(intTeller) End If intTeller = intTeller + 1 Wend Session.Output strRet Attribute2Column = strRet
End Function
Sub CreateConnectorForAttribute(objSource, objTarget)
Dim objCon as EA.Connector Dim objEle as EA.Element
Set objEle = Repository.GetElementByID(objSource.ParentId) set objCon = objEle.Connectors.AddNew(objSource.Name, "") objCon.SupplierID = objSource.ParentID objCon.ClientID = objTarget.ParentId objCon.Direction = "Destination to Source" objCon.StyleEx = "LFEP=" & objSource.attributeguid & "L;LFSP=" & objTarget.attributeguid & "R;"
objCon.Update()
End Sub
Function CopyClass2UI(objEle)
Dim objNewDiagram As EA.Diagram Dim objDON as EA.DiagramObject Dim objGUI as EA.Element Dim objLabel as EA.Element Dim objAttribute as EA.Attribute Dim objPack as EA.Package Dim intX Dim intY Dim intLen Dim strControl
Set objPack = Repository.GetPackageByID(objEle.PackageId) Set objNewDiagram = objPack.Diagrams.AddNew(objEle.Name & " User Interface", "simpleUI") objNewDiagram.Update() Set objDON = objNewDiagram.DiagramObjects.AddNew("", "") objDON.ElementID = objEle.elementId objDON.top = -20 objDON.bottom = -200 objDON.left = 700 objDON.right = 900 objDON.ShowNotes = false objDON.Update()
intX = 200 intY = -20 For each objAttribute In objEle.Attributes intLen = 400 If Mid(objAttribute.Type, 1,6)="Lookup" Then strControl = "simpleCombobox" ElseIf objAttribute.Type = "Date" Then strControl = "simpleDateTime" intlen = 100 ElseIf objAttribute.Type = "Short" Or objAttribute.Type = "Long" Or objAttribute.Type = "Integer" Then strControl = "simpleEdit" intlen = 100 ElseIf objAttribute.Type = "Boolean" Then strControl = "simpleCheckBox" intlen = 200 Else strControl = "simpleEdit" End If Dim strLabel strLabel = Replace(objAttribute.Name, "_", " ") strLabel = Replace(strLabel, " id", "") Set objGUI = objPack.Elements.AddNew(objAttribute.Name, strControl) Dim objTV as EA.TaggedValue Set objTV = objGUI.TaggedValues.AddNew("IDEAOriginalAttribute", objAttribute.AttributeGUID) objTV.Value = objAttribute.AttributeGUID objTV.Update objGUI.TaggedValues.Refresh objGUI.Update Set objLabel = objPack.Elements.AddNew(strLabel, "simpleLabel") objLabel.Update
objPack.Elements.Refresh objPack.Update
Dim objCon as EA.Connector set objCon = objEle.Connectors.AddNew(objAttribute.Name, "") objCon.SupplierID = objEle.ElementID objCon.ClientID = objGUI.elementId objCon.Direction = "Destination to Source" objCon.StyleEx = "LFEP=" & objAttribute.attributeguid & "L;" objCon.Update()
Set objDON = objNewDiagram.DiagramObjects.AddNew("", "") objDON.ElementID = objGUI.elementId objDON.top = intY objDON.bottom = (intY-25) objDON.left = 155 objDON.right = 155 + intLen objDON.Update()
Set objDON = objNewDiagram.DiagramObjects.AddNew("", "") objDON.ElementID = objLabel.elementId objDON.top = intY objDON.bottom = (intY-25) objDON.left = 20 objDON.right = 150 intY = intY - 30 objDON.Update()
objNewDiagram.DiagramObjects.Refresh objNewDiagram.Update Next
CopyClass2UI = objNewDiagram.DiagramID End Function
Sub Table2MappingDiagram(currentdiagram)
' Get a reference to any selected connector/objects dim selectedConnector as EA.Connector dim selectedObjects as EA.Collection dim objDO as EA.DiagramObject Dim objEle as EA.Element Dim objAttribute as EA.Attribute Dim objColumn as EA.Attribute Dim objPack as EA.Package Dim objTable as EA.Element
set selectedConnector = currentDiagram.SelectedConnector set selectedObjects = currentDiagram.SelectedObjects
if not selectedConnector is nothing then elseif selectedObjects.Count > 0 then Set objPack = Repository.GetPackageById(currentDiagram.PackageID) Set objTable = objPack.Elements.AddNew(currentDiagram.Name & "_Mapping", "EAUML::table") For each objDO in selectedObjects set objEle = Repository.GetElementById(objDO.elementid) objTable.Notes = "Copy from table 2 mapping" objTable.Gentype = "SQLServer" objTable.Type = "table" For each objAttribute in objEle.Attributes Set objColumn = objTable.Attributes.AddNew(objAttribute.Name, "Column") objColumn.AllowDuplicates = objAttribute.AllowDuplicates objColumn.Notes = objAttribute.Notes objColumn.Type = objAttribute.Type objColumn.Pos = objAttribute.Pos Dim objTV as EA.TaggedValue Set objTV = objColumn.TaggedValues.AddNew("IDEAOriginalAttribute", objAttribute.AttributeGUID) objTV.Value = objAttribute.AttributeGUID objTV.Update objColumn.Update() Dim objCon as EA.Connector set objCon = objEle.Connectors.AddNew(objAttribute.Name, "") objCon.SupplierID = objEle.ElementID objCon.ClientID = objTable.elementId objCon.Direction = "Destination to Source" objCon.StyleEx = "LFEP=" & objAttribute.attributeguid & "L;LFSP=" & objColumn.attributeguid & "R;" objCon.Update() Next objEle.Update() objTable.Update Dim objDON As EA.DiagramObject Set objDON = currentDiagram.DiagramObjects.AddNew("", "") objDON.ElementID = objTable.ElementID objDON.top = objDO.top objDON.bottom = objDO.bottom objDON.left = objDO.Left + (objDO.right - objDO.left) + 50 objDON.right = objDO.right + (objDO.right - objDO.left) + 50 objDON.ShowNotes = false objDON.Update() Session.Output objEle.Name currentDiagram.Update Repository.ReloadDiagram(currentDiagram.DiagramID) Next else Session.Output "Select one or more classes" end if
End Sub

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib
sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
' Handling Code: Uncomment any types you wish this script to support ' NOTE: You can toggle comments on multiple lines that are currently ' selected with [CTRL]+[SHIFT]+[C]. select case treeSelectedType
case otElement ' Code for when an element is selected dim theElement as EA.Element set theElement = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() If Session.Prompt("Create ArchiMate Business Objects (instead of Data Objects)", promptYESNO) = resultYes Then CopyClass theElement, Repository.GetPackageByID(theElement.PackageID), "BUSINESSOBJECT" Else CopyClass theElement, Repository.GetPackageByID(theElement.PackageID), "DATAOBJECT" End If
' case otPackage ' ' Code for when a package is selected ' dim thePackage as EA.Package ' set thePackage = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' case otDiagram dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() If Session.Prompt("Create ArchiMate Business Objects (instead of Data Objects)", promptYESNO) = resultYes Then CopyClassFromDiagram theDiagram, "BUSINESSOBJECT" Else CopyClassFromDiagram theDiagram, "DATAOBJECT" End If
case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib ' ' Project Browser Script main function ' sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
' Handling Code: Uncomment any types you wish this script to support ' NOTE: You can toggle comments on multiple lines that are currently ' selected with [CTRL]+[SHIFT]+[C]. select case treeSelectedType
case otElement ' Code for when an element is selected dim theElement as EA.Element set theElement = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClass theElement, Repository.GetPackageByID(theElement.PackageID), "CLASS"
' case otPackage ' ' Code for when a package is selected ' dim thePackage as EA.Package ' set thePackage = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' case otDiagram ' Code for when a diagram is selected dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClassFromDiagram theDiagram, "CLASS" ' case otAttribute ' ' Code for when an attribute is selected ' dim theAttribute as EA.Attribute ' set theAttribute = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' ' case otMethod ' ' Code for when a method is selected ' dim theMethod as EA.Method ' set theMethod = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject()
case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib ' ' This code has been included from the default Project Browser template. ' If you wish to modify this template, it is located in the Config\Script Templates ' directory of your EA install path. ' ' Script Name: ' Author: ' Purpose: ' Date: '
' ' Project Browser Script main function ' sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
' Handling Code: Uncomment any types you wish this script to support ' NOTE: You can toggle comments on multiple lines that are currently ' selected with [CTRL]+[SHIFT]+[C]. select case treeSelectedType
case otElement ' Code for when an element is selected dim theElement as EA.Element set theElement = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() If Session.Prompt("Create a lookup interface?", promptYesNo) = resultYes Then CopyClass theElement, Repository.GetPackageByID(theElement.PackageID), "INTERFACE" End If If Session.Prompt("Create a user interface (UI)?", promptYesNo) = resultYes Then CopyClass2UI theElement End If ' case otPackage ' ' Code for when a package is selected ' dim thePackage as EA.Package ' set thePackage = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' ' case otDiagram ' ' Code for when a diagram is selected ' dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram ' set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' ' case otAttribute ' ' Code for when an attribute is selected ' dim theAttribute as EA.Attribute ' set theAttribute = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' ' case otMethod ' ' Code for when a method is selected ' dim theMethod as EA.Method ' set theMethod = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject()
case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript
' ' This code has been included from the default Project Browser template. ' If you wish to modify this template, it is located in the Config\Script Templates ' directory of your EA install path. ' ' Script Name: ' Author: ' Purpose: ' Date: '
' ' Project Browser Script main function ' sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
' Handling Code: Uncomment any types you wish this script to support ' NOTE: You can toggle comments on multiple lines that are currently ' selected with [CTRL]+[SHIFT]+[C]. select case treeSelectedType case otDiagram ' Code for when a diagram is selected ' Merging a set of elements to a package from a diagram, this is necessary for migrating a project to the central repository dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram dim theDO as EA.DiagramObject dim theElement as EA.Element set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() For Each theDO in theDiagram.DiagramObjects Set theElement = Repository.GetElementByID(theDO.ElementId) theElement.PackageID = theDiagram.PackageID theElement.Update() Next case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript ' WARNING Change this constant for your own Export Directory public const DirName = "c:\werkmap"
sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
' Handling Code: Uncomment any types you wish this script to support ' NOTE: You can toggle comments on multiple lines that are currently ' selected with [CTRL]+[SHIFT]+[C]. select case treeSelectedType
case otPackage ' Code for when a package is selected dim thePackage as EA.Package set thePackage = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ExportDiagrams(thePackage) Session.Prompt "Diagrams exported to " & DirName, promptOK case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOk end select end sub
Sub ExportDiagrams(objPackage) Dim objProject as EA.Project Dim objDiagram as EA.Diagram
set objProject = Repository.GetProjectInterface() For Each objDiagram In objPackage.Diagrams Repository.OpenDiagram(objDiagram.DiagramID) objProject.SaveDiagramImageToFile(DirName & "\" & objDiagram.DiagramID & ".png") Repository.CloseDiagram(objDiagram.DiagramID) Next Dim objChild For Each objChild In objPackage.Packages ExportDiagrams(objChild) Next End Sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript ' WARNING Change this constant for your own Export Directory public const DirName = "c:\werkmap\diagrams"
sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
' Handling Code: Uncomment any types you wish this script to support ' NOTE: You can toggle comments on multiple lines that are currently ' selected with [CTRL]+[SHIFT]+[C]. select case treeSelectedType
case otPackage ' Code for when a package is selected dim thePackage as EA.Package set thePackage = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ExportDiagrams(thePackage) Session.Prompt "Diagrams exported to " & DirName, promptOK case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOk end select end sub
Sub ExportDiagrams(objPackage) Dim objProject as EA.Project Dim objDiagram as EA.Diagram
set objProject = Repository.GetProjectInterface() For Each objDiagram In objPackage.Diagrams Repository.OpenDiagram(objDiagram.DiagramID) objProject.SaveDiagramImageToFile(DirName & "\" & objDiagram.DiagramGUID & ".png") Repository.CloseDiagram(objDiagram.DiagramID) Next Dim objChild For Each objChild In objPackage.Packages ExportDiagrams(objChild) Next End Sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript
' ' This code has been included from the default Diagram Script template. ' If you wish to modify this template, it is located in the Config\Script Templates ' directory of your EA install path. ' ' Script Name: ' Author: ' Purpose: ' Date: '
' ' Diagram Script main function ' sub OnDiagramScript()
' Get a reference to the current diagram dim currentDiagram as EA.Diagram set currentDiagram = Repository.GetCurrentDiagram()
if not currentDiagram is nothing then ' Get a reference to any selected connector/objects dim selectedConnector as EA.DiagramLink For each selectedConnector in currentDiagram.DiagramLinks selectedConnector.LineStyle = 1 selectedConnector.Update() Next currentDiagram.Update() Repository.ReloadDiagram(currentDiagram.DiagramID) else Session.Prompt "This script requires a diagram to be visible", promptOK end if
end sub
OnDiagramScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib
sub OnProjectBrowserScript() dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType() select case treeSelectedType case otDiagram ' Code for when a diagram is selected dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClassFromDiagram theDiagram, "XSD" case otElement ' Code for when an element is selected dim theElement as EA.Element set theElement = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClass theElement, Repository.GetPackageByID(theElement.PackageID), "XSD"
case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib
sub OnProjectBrowserScript() dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType() select case treeSelectedType case otDiagram ' Code for when a diagram is selected dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClassFromDiagram theDiagram, "CLASS" ' case otElement ' Code for when an element is selected dim theElement as EA.Element set theElement = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClass theElement, Repository.GetPackageByID(theElement.PackageID), "Class"
case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript
' ' This code has been included from the default Diagram Script template. ' If you wish to modify this template, it is located in the Config\Script Templates ' directory of your EA install path. ' ' Script Name: ' Author: ' Purpose: ' Date: '
' ' Diagram Script main function ' sub OnDiagramScript() Dim currentDiagram as EA.Diagram set currentDiagram = Repository.GetCurrentDiagram()
if not currentDiagram is nothing then ' Get a reference to any selected connector/objects dim selectedConnector as EA.Connector dim selectedObjects as EA.Collection dim objDO as EA.DiagramObject dim objDONew as EA.DiagramObject Dim objEle as EA.Element Dim objConnector as EA.Connector Dim objColumn as EA.Attribute Dim objPack as EA.Package Dim objMerge as EA.Element Dim newConnector as EA.Connector Dim mergeConnector as EA.Connector Dim targetId
set selectedConnector = currentDiagram.SelectedConnector set selectedObjects = currentDiagram.SelectedObjects
if not selectedConnector is nothing then elseif selectedObjects.Count > 0 then Set objPack = Repository.GetPackageById(currentDiagram.PackageID) Set objMerge = objPack.Elements.AddNew("Merger", "Class") objMerge.Update() Set objDONew = currentDiagram.DiagramObjects.AddNew("", "") objDONew.ElementID = objMerge.ElementID objDONew.left = 200 objDONew.top = -10 objDONew.Update() For each objDO in selectedObjects set objEle = Repository.GetElementById(objDO.elementid) For each objConnector in objEle.Connectors If Session.Prompt("Do you want to move " & objConnector.Name & " to the merger?", PromptYesNo) = ResultYes Then If objConnector.SupplierId = objEle.ElementId Then targetId = objConnector.ClientId objConnector.ClientId = objMerge.ElementId
End If If objConnector.ClientId = objEle.ElementId Then targetId = objConnector.SupplierId objConnector.SupplierId = objMerge.ElementId End If objConnector.Update() Set newConnector = objMerge.Connectors.AddNew("Merger ", "") Dim blnFound blnFound = false For each mergeConnector in objMerge.Connectors If mergeConnector.ClientId = objMerge.ElementID And mergeConnector.SupplierID = targetID Then blnFound = true End If Next If blnFound = false then newConnector.ClientId = objMerge.ElementID newConnector.SupplierID = targetID newConnector.Update() End if objMerge.Update()
End If Next objEle.Update() objMerge.Update Session.Output objEle.Name currentDiagram.Update Repository.ReloadDiagram(currentDiagram.DiagramID) Next else Session.Output "Select one or more classes" end if else Session.Prompt "This script requires a diagram to be visible", promptOK end if
end sub
OnDiagramScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib
sub OnProjectBrowserScript() dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType() select case treeSelectedType
case otElement ' Code for when an element is selected dim theElement as EA.Element set theElement = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClass theElement, Repository.GetPackageByID(theElement.PackageID), "TABLE"
case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib
sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
select case treeSelectedType
case otDiagram ' Code for when a diagram is selected dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClassFromDiagram theDiagram, "CLASS" ' case otAttribute ' ' Code for when an attribute is selected ' dim theAttribute as EA.Attribute ' set theAttribute = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' ' case otMethod ' ' Code for when a method is selected ' dim theMethod as EA.Method ' set theMethod = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject()
case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib
sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
select case treeSelectedType case otDiagram ' Code for when a diagram is selected dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClassFromDiagram theDiagram, "XSD" case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC Reporting-Library.Reporting-Lib
sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
InitializeVariabelen select case treeSelectedType case otPackage ' Code for when a package is selected dim oPackage as EA.Package set oPackage = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() Repository.EnableUIUpdates = False PubliceerRootPackage(oPackage) Repository.EnableUIUpdates = True Session.Prompt "Generator ready!!", PromptOk case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "Only available for package elements", promptOK
end select Session.OutPut "GENERATOR READY!!!" end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript Const ForReading = 1, ForWriting = 2 Const DiagElemCombined = False Const PP_Extension = ".html" Const PP_PATH = "C:\werkmap\" Const PP_TEMPLATE = "templates\basis_template.html" Const PP_Coverpage = "IDEA Coverpage" Const PP_DiagramTemplate = "IDEA Diagram" Const PP_ElementTemplate = "IDEA Datamodel" Const PP_PackageTemplate = "IDEA Package" Const PP_Attributen = True Const PP_Associaties = True Const PP_Constraints = True Const PP_DiagramLinks = True Const PP_Files = True Const PP_Operaties = True Const Debugging = True Const CreatePDFReport = True Dim oFileSO Dim oFile Dim sPath Dim sTemplate Dim sSiteMap Dim sPDFMap Dim sSideBar Dim sImage Sub DebugMelding(Melding) If Debugging = True Then Session.Output Melding End If End Sub Sub InitializeVariabelen() 'Definieer de globale variabelen en objecten en stel ze in op de gewenste inhoud set oFileSO = CreateObject( "Scripting.FileSystemObject" ) sPath = PP_PATH sTemplate = "#content#" ReadHTMLTemplate(PP_TEMPLATE) sSiteMap = "" sPDFMap = "" sSideBar = "" End Sub Sub ReadHTMLTemplate(sTemplateFile) 'Lees het template in zodat iedere pagina eenzelfde opbouw krijgt obv dit template Dim oFile Set oFile = oFileSO.OpenTextFile(sPath & sTemplateFile, ForReading) sTemplate = oFile.ReadAll oFile.Close End Sub Function MaakURL(sTitel, sURL) 'Maak een url voor een lijst of overzicht MaakURL = "" & sTitel & "" End Function sub Export2HTML(sNaam, sContent) 'Export content naar een htmlfile gebaseerd op een constante in het templatebased on the constant of the path Dim sValue If sSideBar <> "" Then sSideBar = "

Koppelingen

" & sSideBar & "" End If sValue = Replace(sTemplate, "#content#", sContent) sValue = Replace(sValue, "#sidebar#", sSideBar) sValue = Replace(sValue, "#image#", sImage) sSideBar = "" sImage = "" set oFile = oFileSO.CreateTextFile( sPath & sNaam & PP_Extension, true ) sValue = CleanupHaakjes(sValue) oFile.WriteLine( sValue ) oFile.Close() DebugMelding sPath & sNaam & " Webpagina is aangemaakt" end sub Sub PubliceerRootPackage(oPkg) 'Voor de zekerheid als de root anders verwerkt gaat worden PubliceerPackage(oPkg) sSiteMap = "
    " & sSiteMap & "
" Export2Html "SiteMap", sSiteMap sPDFMap = "
    " & sPDFMap & "
" Export2Html "Index", sPDFMap End Sub Sub SaveDiagramImage(iDiagram) 'Schrijf diagram weg naar een plaatje (in png) Dim objProject as EA.Project set objProject = Repository.GetProjectInterface() Repository.OpenDiagram(iDiagram) objProject.SaveDiagramImageToFile(sPath & "diagram" & iDiagram & ".png") Repository.CloseDiagram(iDiagram) End Sub Sub MaakSiteMapURL(sURL, bNiveau) 'Opbouwen van de sitemap met URLs packages krijgen een h3 If bNiveau = true then sSiteMap = sSiteMap & "

" & sUrl & "

    " Else sSiteMap = sSiteMap & "
  • " & sUrl & "
    • " end if End Sub Sub PubliceerPackage(oPkg) Dim sInhoud Dim sFNaam Dim oDiagram As EA.Diagram Dim oSubPkg as EA.Package Dim sOpsommingPackage Dim sOpsommingDiagram MaakSiteMapURL MaakURL(oPkg.Name, "package" & oPkg.PackageID), true 'Aanmaken content obv de variabelen in het object sInhoud = "

    " & oPkg.name & "

    " if len(oPkg.notes)>0 then sInhoud = sInhoud & "

    " & oPkg.notes & "

    " end if sOpsommingPackage = "
      " For Each oSubPkg In oPkg.Packages sSiteMap = sSiteMap & "
        " sOpsommingPackage = sOpsommingPackage & "
      • " & MaakURL(oSubPkg.Name, "package" & oSubPkg.PackageID) & "
        • " PubliceerPackage(oSubPkg) sSiteMap = sSiteMap & "
      " Next If Len(sOpsommingPackage)>5 Then sOpsommingPackage = sOpsommingPackage & "
    " sInhoud = sInhoud & "

    Detailpackages

    " & sOpsommingPackage End If sOpsommingDiagram = "
      " For Each oDiagram In oPkg.Diagrams sOpsommingDiagram = sOpsommingDiagram & "
    • " & MaakURL(oDiagram.Name, "diagram" & oDiagram.DiagramID) & "
      • " PubliceerDiagram(oDiagram) Next If Len(sOpsommingDiagram)>5 Then sOpsommingDiagram = sOpsommingDiagram & "
    " sInhoud = sInhoud & "

    Diagrammen

    " & sOpsommingDiagram End If If oPkg.Diagrams.Count>0 And CreatePDFReport = True Then MaakDocumentVoorPackage(oPkg) sInhoud = sInhoud & "Open PDF document" sPDFMap = sPDFMap & "
  • " & oPkg.Name & "
    • " End if 'Wegschrijven van het materiaal naar een html bestand sFNaam = "package" & oPkg.packageId Export2HTML sFNaam, sInhoud End Sub Function Element2Map(oElement, oDO, MinX, MinY, MaxX) Dim sCoord Dim dFactor sCoord="" If DiagElemCombined = False Then dfactor = 1 sCoord = sCoord & "" End If Element2Map = sCoord End Function Sub PubliceerDiagram(oDgm) Dim sInhoud Dim sFNaam Dim oElement AS EA.Element Dim oDiagramObject Dim sOpsommingElement Dim sMap Dim iMinX Dim iMinY Dim iMaxX MaakSiteMapURL MaakURL(oDgm.Name, "diagram" & oDgm.DiagramID), false 'Aanmaken content obv de variabelen in het object sInhoud = "

    " & oDgm.name & "

    " 'Aanmaken map elementen sMap = "" if len(oDgm.notes)>0 then sInhoud = sInhoud & "

    " & oDgm.notes & "

    " end if iMaxX = 0 iMinX = 1000 iMinY = 1000 dim sortedDiagramObjects set sortedDiagramObjects = sortDiagramObjectsCollection(oDgm.DiagramObjects) For Each oDiagramObject In sortedDiagramObjects If Abs(oDiagramObject.Top) < iMinY Then iMinY = Abs(oDiagramObject.Top) End If If oDiagramObject.Left < iMinX Then iMinX = oDiagramObject.Left End If If oDiagramObject.Right > iMaxX Then iMaxX = oDiagramObject.Right End If Next iMinY = iMinY - 40 iMinX = iMinX - 20 If DiagElemCombined = true Then Dim sElementen sElementen = "" For Each oDiagramObject In sortedDiagramObjects set oElement = Repository.GetElementByID(oDiagramObject.ElementID) Dim sElement sElement = SamenStellenElement(oElement) sMap = sMap & Element2Map(oElement, oDiagramObject, iMinX, iMinY, iMaxX) 'If Len(oElement.MiscData(0)) = 0 Then sElementen = sElementen & sElement 'End If Next sInhoud = sInhoud & sElementen Else sOpsommingElement = "
      " For Each oDiagramObject In sortedDiagramObjects set oElement = Repository.GetElementByID(oDiagramObject.ElementID) sOpsommingElement = sOpsommingElement & "
    • " & MaakURL(oElement.Name, "element" & oElement.ElementID) & "
      • " PubliceerElement(oElement) sMap = sMap & Element2Map(oElement, oDiagramObject, iMinX, iMinY, iMaxX) Next If Len(sOpsommingElement)>5 Then sInhoud = sInhoud & "
        " & sOpsommingElement & "
      " End If End If sMap = sMap & "" 'Plaatje exporteren en img tag maken sImage = "#map#" sImage = Replace(sImage, "#map#", sMap) SaveDiagramImage( oDgm.DiagramId ) 'Wegschrijven van het materiaal naar een html bestand sFNaam = "diagram" & oDgm.DiagramId Export2HTML sFNaam, sInhoud End Sub Function SamenStellenAttributen(oEle) Dim oAttribute as EA.Attribute Dim sAttributes If PP_Attributen = True Then sAttributes = "" For Each oAttribute in oEle.Attributes sAttributes = sAttributes & "" Next If Len(sAttributes)>85 then sAttributes = sAttributes & "
      NaamTypeOmschrijving
      " & oAttribute.Name & "" & oAttribute.Type & "" & oAttribute.Notes & "

      " SamenStellenAttributen = "Attributen" & sAttributes Else SamenStellenAttributen = "" End If End If End Function Function SamenStellenDiagramLinks(oEle) Dim oDiagram as EA.Diagram Dim sDiagrams If PP_DiagramLinks = True Then sDiagrams = "" For Each oDiagram in oEle.Diagrams sDiagrams = sDiagram & "" Next If Len(sDiagrams)>85 then sDiagrams = sDiagrams & "
      NaamOmschrijving
      " & MaakURL(oDiagram.Name, "diagram" & oDiagram.DiagramID) & "" & oDiagram.Notes & "

      " SamenStellenDiagramLinks = "Zichtbaar in diagrammen" & sDiagrams Else SamenStellenDiagramLinks = "" End If End If End Function Function SamenStellenOperaties(oEle) Dim oOperation as EA.Method Dim sOperaties If PP_Operaties = True Then sOperaties = "Sleutels" For Each oOperation in oEle.Methods sOperaties = sOperaties & "" Next If Len(sOperaties )>85 then sOperaties = sOperaties & "
      NaamTypeOmschrijving
      " & oOperation.Name & "" & oOperation.Stereotype & "" & oOperation.Notes & "

      " SamenStellenOperaties = sOperaties Else SamenStellenOperaties = "" End If End If End Function Function SamenStellenConstraints(oEle) Dim oConstraint as EA.Constraint Dim sConstraints If PP_Constraints = True Then sConstraints = "" For Each oConstraint in oEle.Constraints sConstraints = sConstraints & "" Next If Len(sConstraints)>85 then sConstraints = sConstraints & "
      NaamTypeOmschrijving
      " & oConstraint.Name & "" & oConstraint.Type & "" & oConstraint.Notes & "

      " SamenStellenConstraints = "Condities" & sConstraints Else SamenStellenConstraints = "" End If End If End Function Function SamenStellenAssociaties(oEle) Dim oConnector as EA.Connector Dim oLinkEle as EA.Element Dim sAssociaties If PP_Associaties = True Then sAssociaties = "" For Each oConnector in oEle.Connectors If oConnector.SupplierID = oEle.ElementID Then Set oLinkEle = Repository.GetElementByID(oConnector.ClientID) Else Set oLinkEle = Repository.GetElementByID(oConnector.SupplierID) End If sAssociaties = sAssociaties & "" Next If Len(sAssociaties)>85 then sAssociaties = sAssociaties & "
      NaamTypeGekoppeld element
      " & oConnector.Name & "" & oConnector.StereoType & "" & MaakURL(oLinkEle.Name, "element" & oLinkEle.ElementID) & "

      " SamenStellenAssociaties = "Associaties" & sAssociaties Else SamenStellenAssociaties = "" End If End If End Function Function SamenStellenFiles(oEle) Dim oFile as EA.File Dim sFile If PP_Associaties = True Then sFile = "
        " For Each oFile in oEle.Files sFile = sFile & "
      • " & "" & oFile.Name & "  " & oFile.Notes & "
        • " Next If Len(sFile)>5 then sFile = sfile & "
      " SamenStellenFiles = "Meer informatie" & sFile Else SamenStellenFiles = "" End If End If End Function Function SamenStellenElement(oEle) Dim sEleInhoud Dim blnData blnData = False sEleInhoud = "" sEleInhoud = "

      " & oEle.name & "

      " if len(oEle.notes)>0 then sEleInhoud = sEleInhoud & "

      " & Replace(oEle.notes, "$inet://", "") & "

      " blnData = true end if sEleInhoud = sEleInhoud & SamenStellenConstraints(oEle) sEleInhoud = sEleInhoud & SamenStellenAttributen(oEle) sEleInhoud = sEleInhoud & SamenStellenOperaties(oEle) sEleInhoud = sEleInhoud & SamenStellenAssociaties(oEle) sEleInhoud = sEleInhoud & SamenStellenFiles(oEle) sEleInhoud = sEleInhoud & SamenStellenDiagramLinks(oEle) 'If oEle.IsComposite Then ' sSideBar = sSideBar & "
    • " & MaakURL(oEle.CompositeDiagram.Name, "diagram" & oEle.CompositeDiagram.diagramID ) & "
      • " 'Else if Len(oEle.MiscData(0))>0 Then ' sSideBar = sSideBar & "
    • " & MaakURL(oEle.Notes, "diagram" & oEle.MiscData(0) ) & "
      • " 'End If 'End If 'sEleInhoud = CleanupHaakjes(sEleInhoud) SamenStellenElement = sEleInhoud End Function Function CleanUpHaakjes(strIn) Dim a, x a=Array("<>","<>", "<>", "<>", "<>") for each x in a strIn = Replace(strIn,x, "") next CleanUpHaakjes = strIn End Function Sub PubliceerElement(oEle) 'Aparte functie zodat we dit voor een losse pagina of een lijst bij een diagram kunnen oproepen Dim sFNaam Dim sText sText = SamenStellenElement(oEle) 'Wegschrijven van het materiaal naar een html bestand sFNaam = "element" & oEle.ElementId Export2HTML sFNaam, sText End Sub Sub MaakDocumentVoorPackage(oPkg) 'Aanmaken van een PPF document op basis van reporting object in EA dim docGenerator as EA.DocumentGenerator set docGenerator = Repository.CreateDocumentGenerator() ' Create a new document if docGenerator.NewDocument("") = true then dim generationSuccess generationSuccess = false generationSuccess = docGenerator.InsertCoverPageDocument(PP_Coverpage) docGenerator.InsertBreak( breakPage ) generationSuccess = docGenerator.InsertTableOfContents() docGenerator.InsertBreak( breakPage ) generationSuccess = docGenerator.DocumentPackage( oPkg.PackageID, 0, PP_PackageTemplate ) dim oDiagram as EA.Diagram For Each oDiagram in oPkg.Diagrams generationSuccess = docGenerator.DocumentDiagram( oDiagram.DiagramID, 0, PP_DiagramTemplate ) if generationSuccess = false then DebugMelding "Foutmelding document creatie: " + docGenerator.GetLastError() end if Dim oElement as EA.DiagramObject dim sortedDiagramObjects set sortedDiagramObjects = sortDiagramObjectsCollection(oDiagram.DiagramObjects) For Each oElement in sortedDiagramObjects Dim oObject as EA.Element Set oObject = Repository.GetElementByID(oElement.ElementID) If oObject.Type = "Text" Then Else generationSuccess = docGenerator.DocumentElement( oElement.ElementID, 0, PP_ElementTemplate ) if generationSuccess = false then DebugMelding "Foutmelding document creatie: " + docGenerator.GetLastError() Else DebugMelding oElement.ElementID & " is aangemaakt! " End If End If Next docGenerator.InsertBreak( breakPage ) next ' Save the document dim saveSuccess saveSuccess = docGenerator.SaveDocument( sPath & "packagedocument" & oPkg.PackageID & ".PDF", 2) if saveSuccess = false then DebugMelding "Fout bij opslaan bestand: " + docGenerator.GetLastError() else DebugMelding sPath & "packagedocument" & oPkg.PackageID & ".PDF aangemaakt" end if end if End Sub function sortDiagramObjectsCollection (diagramObjects) dim sortedDiagramObjects dim diagramObject as EA.DiagramObject set sortedDiagramObjects = CreateObject("System.Collections.ArrayList") for each diagramObject in diagramObjects sortedDiagramObjects.Add (diagramObject) next set sortDiagramObjectsCollection = sortDiagramObjectsArrayList(sortedDiagramObjects) end function function sortDiagramObjectsArrayList (diagramObjects) dim i dim goAgain goAgain = false dim thisElement as EA.DiagramObject dim nextElement as EA.DiagramObject for i = 0 to diagramObjects.Count -2 step 1 set thisElement = diagramObjects(i) set nextElement = diagramObjects(i +1) if diagramObjectIsAfterYX(thisElement, nextElement) then diagramObjects.RemoveAt(i +1) diagramObjects.Insert i, nextElement goAgain = true end if next 'if we had to swap an element then we go over the list again if goAgain then set diagramObjects = sortDiagramObjectsArrayList (diagramObjects) end if 'return the sorted list set sortDiagramObjectsArrayList = diagramObjects end function 'returns true if thisElement should come after the nextElement (both diagramObjects) function diagramObjectIsAfterYX(thisElement, nextElement) if thisElement.left < nextElement.left then diagramObjectIsAfterYX = false elseif thisElement.left = nextElement.left then if thisElement.top < nextElement.top then diagramObjectIsAfterYX = true else diagramObjectIsAfterYX = false end if else diagramObjectIsAfterYX = true end if end function

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript !INC MappingEtcLibrary.MappingLib ' ' This code has been included from the default Project Browser template. ' If you wish to modify this template, it is located in the Config\Script Templates ' directory of your EA install path. ' ' Script Name: ' Author: ' Purpose: ' Date: '
' ' Project Browser Script main function ' sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
' Handling Code: Uncomment any types you wish this script to support ' NOTE: You can toggle comments on multiple lines that are currently ' selected with [CTRL]+[SHIFT]+[C]. select case treeSelectedType
case otElement ' Code for when an element is selected dim theElement as EA.Element set theElement = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CopyClass2UI theElement ' case otPackage ' ' Code for when a package is selected ' dim thePackage as EA.Package ' set thePackage = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' ' case otDiagram ' ' Code for when a diagram is selected ' dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram ' set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' ' case otAttribute ' ' Code for when an attribute is selected ' dim theAttribute as EA.Attribute ' set theAttribute = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() ' ' case otMethod ' ' Code for when a method is selected ' dim theMethod as EA.Method ' set theMethod = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject()
case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select
end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript

Column.name: Script
Column.value:
option explicit
!INC Local Scripts.EAConstants-VBScript ' Use a prompt dialog or the session output window for the results const useprompt = false
Sub CheckPackage(strPackage) ' Check the uniques of the elements placed in a package, this is a recursive function because it processes also the subpackages and daigrams in the packages Dim oPackage as EA.Package Dim theElement as EA.Element Dim theSubPackage as EA.Package Dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram Dim strSubPackage
Set oPackage = Repository.GetPackageByID(strPackage) For Each theSubPackage in oPackage.Packages strSubPackage = theSubPackage.PackageID CheckPackage strSubPackage Next
For each theDiagram in oPackage.Diagrams CheckDiagram theDiagram.DiagramID Next
For Each theElement in oPackage.Elements CheckUniqueElement theElement.ElementId Next
End Sub
Sub CheckDiagram(strDiagram) ' Check the uniques of the elements placed on a diagram Dim oDiagram as EA.Diagram Dim theDO as EA.DiagramObject
Set oDiagram = Repository.GetDiagramByID(strDiagram) For Each theDO in oDiagram.DiagramObjects CheckUniqueElement theDO.ElementId Next
End Sub
Sub CheckUniqueElement(strElement) ' Check the uniques of the elements based on the elementid Dim sSql Dim strVal Dim oElement as EA.Element
Set oElement = Repository.GetElementByID(strElement) If InStr(oElement.Stereotype, "ArchiMate>") >= 0 Then sSql = "SELECT Count(*) as aantal FROM t_object WHERE t_object.name = '#name#' AND t_object.Stereotype='#stereotype#' AND t_object.ea_guid<>'#guid#' " sSql = Replace(sSql, "#name#", oElement.Name) sSql = Replace(sSql, "#stereotype#", oElement.Stereotype) sSql = Replace(sSql, "#guid#", oElement.ElementGUID)
strVal = Repository.SQLQuery(sSql)
If InStr(strVal, "<aantal>0</aantal>") > 0 Then If UsePrompt = true Then Session.Output oElement.name & " is unique!!" end if Else If UsePrompt = true Then Session.Prompt oElement.name & " is NOT Unique!!", promptOK Else Session.Output oElement.name & " is NOT Unique!!" End If End If End if End Sub
sub OnProjectBrowserScript()
' Get the type of element selected in the Project Browser dim treeSelectedType dim theElement as EA.Element
treeSelectedType = Repository.GetTreeSelectedItemType()
' Handling Code: based on the itemtype a specific sub is selected ' For package this is a recursive implementation select case treeSelectedType
case otElement ' Code for when an element is selected set theElement = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CheckUniqueElement theElement.ElementID case otPackage ' Code for when a package is selected dim thePackage as EA.Package set thePackage = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CheckPackage(thePackage.PackageID) case otDiagram ' Code for when a diagram is selected dim theDiagram as EA.Diagram set theDiagram = Repository.GetTreeSelectedObject() CheckDiagram(theDiagram.DiagramID) case else ' Error message Session.Prompt "This script does not support items of this type.", promptOK
end select Session.OutPut "VALIDATION COMPLETE!!" end sub
OnProjectBrowserScript
